creator: asmodai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: gnats-admin->freebsd-bugs

Misfiled PR 

Note that this issue has been brought up in the past and reasons 
why we don't include the complete etc/services file is due to 
processing overhead of this file. 

So if someone feels like verifying this so that we can once and 
for all decide on this issue, I would be very indebted to that person.
